closing.headline: Of 248 audited items (the 247 gap-analysis to-dos plus one untracked Critical fix), 111 are genuinely done, 42 are partial, and 95 are untouched â€” and coverage is sharply tiered: Critical is 17/21 done with the only untouched item (DV-06 migrations baseline) blocked on owner CLI access, High is 59/86 done, while Medium and Low hold 89 of the 95 untouched items, most of them deliberate Phase 2/3 deferrals. The security program (RLS, storage, RPCs, role gating, DB triggers, CSP, push pipeline) and the PM/inspection/Asset Log modules are substantially complete; the honest soft spots are mobile parity (deep links, notification hub, requester UI, audit trail, RTL), the never-started WO labor/cost module, the SLA policy engine behind the shipped measurements, and billing activation (Stripe config, plan-limit enforcement, platform ZATCA invoices). After deduplicating twins, roughly 37 consolidated items remain genuinely worth building and about 90 are recommended as won't-fix or defer.
